chapter_title.ar: باب بَيْعِ الزَّرْعِ الْأَخْضَرِ وَ الْقَصِيلِ وَ أَشْبَاهِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 133 – Selling the green plants, and the straw, and such like

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/360)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/360)
text: وَ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِأَنْ تَشْتَرِيَ الزَّرْعَ أَوِ الْقَصِيلَ أَخْضَرَ ثُمَّ تَتْرُكَهُ إِنْ شِئْتَ حَتَّى يُسَنْبِلَ ثُمَّ تَحْصُدَهُ وَ إِنْ شِئْتَ أَنْ تَعْلِفَ دَابَّتَكَ قَصِيلًا فَلَا بَأْسَ بِهِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُسَنْبِلَ فَأَمَّا إِذَا سَنْبَلَ فَلَا تَعْلِفْهُ رَأْساً فَإِنَّهُ فَسَادٌ .

en.hubeali: - similar to it, and he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem with you buying the green plants or the straw, then you leave it if you so desire to until it grows seeds, then you harvest it, and if you desire to you feed straw to your animal, for there is no problem with it if it grows sees. So when it grows seeds, so do not feed (your animal), the top part, for it would be spoliing’.
en.sarwar: 3. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from Zurarah a similar Hadith. “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is not unlawful to buy a plantation or greenery, then leave it, if you like, until the ears appear, then harvest, or if you like use it as animal feed as grass and it is not unlawful before ears appear, and when the ears appear then do not use it (ears) as animal feed because it is destroying.’”
